nasb.text: If a trumpet is blown in a city will not the people tremble? If a calamity occurs in a city has not the Lord done it?

esv.text: Is a trumpet blown in a city, and the people are not afraid? Does disaster come to a city, unless the Lord has done it?

cnv.text: 城中如果吹起號角， 居民怎會不驚慌呢？ 災禍如果臨到某城， 不是耶和華所降的嗎？

ccb.text: 若城中响起号角， 居民岂不恐惧颤抖？ 若灾祸降临城中， 岂不是耶和华的作为？
